_comment: DM Room Type library. Enum legend: ventilation type 0=ACH,1=CFM/person,2=CFM/ft2,3=none,5=same-as-cooling; min_supply_air/infiltration 0=ACH,3=none; people 0=count,1=ft2/person; lighting 1=W/ft2; equipment sensible 0=total W,1=W/ft2. Fields cooling_temp_f/heating_temp_f/relative_humidity are DM columns left NULL to inherit from zone; the code's design range is in code_temp_f/code_rh_pct (metadata). pressure_relationship and exhaust are library metadata only — DM has no such room-type columns.

_defaults.note: lighting, equipment, people sensible/latent, and infiltration are DM room-type DEFAULTS, not from the ventilation code tables — review per project. Only ventilation OA, total ACH (170), occupant density, design temp/RH range, pressure (170), and exhaust (FBC) are sourced from each row's code_ref.
